text:
Created attachment 244586
PDF of an email that should have reached the freebsd-current list

Missing from <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2023-September/>, my 13:16 email in response to Mateusz Guzik: 

> Message-ID: <d2e5951a-7c6c-f450-eacc-d8e4f6446118@gmail.com> 

> Date: Sat, 2 Sep 2023 13:16:24 +0100

It's now 14:30 UTC+01:00 BST (British Summer Time).
